features.Key Features:: 1/2.8" CMOS, 2.14MP; | 20x optical zoom, up to 1080P60 video output; | HDMI, 3G-SDI, Ethernet and USB 3.0 outputs; | Support standard UVC/UAC protocol; | Support YUY2 uncompressed video formats; | RS232 In & RS232 Out, support daisy chain; | H.265/H.264 video compression, up to 1080P60 video output;
